# Complete 4-partite graph K_{25,25,25,25}: 100 nodes, χ=4.
# Dense (density=0.758), biconnected, no articulation points.
# Entire graph is one BCC of 100 nodes — DSATUR path, no decomposition benefit.
# With N=4: feasible (zero spills). With N=3: infeasible.
# Ground truth: 4 color classes of 25 nodes each.
